title: ErrorResponse
description: Thin structured error envelope emitted by `duckduckgo-search-cli` on some failure paths. Generated from `src/error.rs::CliError`. v0.9.8: many failures instead emit a full SearchOutput envelope via failure_output/error_output (see search-output.schema.json + search-metadata.schema.json), which already carries agent chrome fields. This thin schema remains for the residual thin error path; when `metadados` is present it may include best-effort chrome agent metadata (not telemetry).

metadados.description: Best-effort partial metadata even on failure (v0.7.10 GAP-WS-60 + GAP-AUD-001). v0.9.8 agent contract (not telemetry): may also include chrome resolution fields on failure envelopes. Prefer full SearchOutput failure envelopes when present — those carry the complete SearchMetadata chrome contract.

usou_chrome.description: v0.9.8 agent contract (not telemetry): honest flag whether Chrome was used before failure.

chrome_path_resolvido.description: v0.9.8 agent contract (not telemetry): resolved Chrome/Chromium binary path after shell/Flatpak resolution, when known on the failure path.

chrome_canal.description: v0.9.8 agent contract (not telemetry): install channel of the resolved browser, when known on the failure path.
